aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Rescue Air Service due to significant gaps in structured data and conversational content. Their current website lacks the necessary elements to be recognized as an authority by AI models.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with common HVAC questions and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but it could benefit from more regular posts and active Q&A management.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but present on the GBP. This inconsistency could confuse AI models and potential customers.
action_items: Add the full business address to the website
Verify and update NAP information across all online directories

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
Lack of Service schema for specific offerings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: The absence of schema markup and conversational content makes it difficult for AI models to understand and recommend the business.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in San Jose, CA, where AI models prioritize businesses with strong structured data and authority signals.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, partnerships, and detailed service explanations to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing your online presence for AI search and AEO.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Rescue Air Service is missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants and voice searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes implementing structured data, creating FAQ content, and enhancing GBP engagement to make your business stand out to AI models and potential customers.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search and AEO.

email_subject_line: Boost Your AI Visibility: Optimize Your HVAC Business for AI Search
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key areas where AI optimization can significantly enhance your online presence.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business AI-ready and capture more leads.
page_title: :::: Rescue Air Service - AIR CONDITIONING & HEATING SPECIALLIST
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
